TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == O pipana' to cidal a kawakawasan kimad == Iti:ya ho i, tosaay ko cidal i kakarayan, cacorok sa patedi to hekal. Orasaka, awaay ko todong to romi'ad adadya i sekal, mafadi' to ko kilakilang rengorengos, ma'icang to ko nanom no 'alo, caay to ka molengaw ko pinaloma, saka mapades ko tamdaw to saka'orip, malowan to pinaloma cango'ot to kakaenen ko tamdaw. Nanoya masasowasowal to ko tamdamdaw to sapipalasawadaw to cecay a cidal. Itiya ira ko tatoloay macodahay a kapah tayra milood toya cidal. Saka mihawikid cangra to kakaenen, ala mifafa saan cangra to kaemangay a wawa. nanoya lomowad to pasayra cangra toya piloodan a lalan. I karomakatan nangra a tala'ayaw, halo pipaloma han to mamo' ato mifolesak to panay, kalo lalitoden a minokay. Nanoya mata'elif to ko romi'ad, mihecaan ko nirakatan i, caay ka rahoday rakaten nangra koya sacokacok tonotono'an a lalan. Nikawrira, ha:to caay ho katahira toya kasadakan no cidal, wata ko nikaraay rakaten. Oya sato tatoloay a kapah i, to'as sato i fatad karomakatan ho no lalan, dadoedo sato a mapatay itiya. Katala'ayawan ho a nifafaan a kaemangay wawa i, masakapah to ko to'as nangra. Padoedo cangra a midotoc to caayay ho kalaheci noya mato'asay, padoedo sa tala'ayaw ko rakat. Orasaka tahira to cangra toya kasadakan no cidal, misetek to cangra i sakatosa romi'ad ko pipana' toya cidal. Mara'od sato ko sakatosa romi'ad to kanikaran to dafak, ala mitatoy cangra to pana', misitara i la'ed no lotok, mitala to kasadak no cidal, nanoya i kasadakan no cidal toya i patama han nangra tatolo ko cecay a cidal mipana', oya fa'edetay remes no cidal pasilawac a ma'efer mitesi'. O cecay a tamdaw mapara'oteng noya fa'edetay remes, nanoya sa a mapatay, oya tatosaay mapacedet a madoka' ko tatirengan. Malaheci to ko demak i, pasiloma' to cangra ko rakat a minokay, oya katala'ayawan nipalomaan a mami' i mato'as to, malofic ko kaciheci. Tahira cangra i niyaro' i, o ma'ofad to ko fokes a mato'asay to. Nanoya pipana' nangra toya cecay a cidal i, malowan to ko tedi ato fa'edet noya cidal, dadaya i masadak to ko cidal. Oya matapesi'ay remas i, malafo'is to falatfat i kakarayan. Nanoya masapinang to ko romi'ad ato dadaya, sanga'ay sato ko 'orip no tamdamdaw itiya.
S.PHON: == o~u pipanaʡ to~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ a kawakawasan kimaɬ~ɮ == iti:ja ħo~u i, to~usaaj ko~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ i kakarajan, ʦaʦo~uro~uk sa patəɬ~ɮi to~u ħəkaɾ. o~urasaka, awaaj ko~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮja i səkaɾ, mafaɬ~ɮiʡ to~u ko~u kiɾakiɾaŋ rəŋo~urəŋo~us, maʡiʦaŋ to~u ko~u nano~um no~u ʡaɾo~u, ʦaaj to~u ka mo~uɾəŋaw ko~u pinaɾo~uma, saka mapaɬ~ɮəs ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw to~u sakaʡo~urip, maɾo~uwan to~u pinaɾo~uma ʦaŋo~uʡo~ut to~u kakaənən ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. nano~uja masaso~uwaso~uwaɾ to~u ko~u tamɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw to~u sapipaɾasawaɬ~ɮaw to~u ʦəʦaj a ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ. itija ira ko~u tato~uɾo~uaj maʦo~uɬ~ɮaħaj a kapaħ tajra miɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ to~uja ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ. saka miħawikiɬ~ɮ ʦaŋra to~u kakaənən, aɾa mifafa saan ʦaŋra to~u kaəmaŋaj a wawa. nano~uja ɾo~umo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u pasajra ʦaŋra to~uja piɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan a ɾaɾan. i karo~umakatan naŋra a taɾaʡajaw, ħaɾo~u pipaɾo~uma ħan to~u mamo~uʡ ato~u mifo~uɾəsak to~u panaj, kaɾo~u ɾaɾito~uɬ~ɮən a mino~ukaj. nano~uja mataʡəɾif to~u ko~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, miħəʦaan ko~u nirakatan i, ʦaaj ka raħo~uɬ~ɮaj rakatən naŋra ko~uja saʦo~ukaʦo~uk to~uno~uto~uno~uʡan a ɾaɾan. nikawrira, ħa:to~u ʦaaj ħo~u kataħira to~uja kasaɬ~ɮakan no~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ, wata ko~u nikaraaj rakatən. o~uja sato~u tato~uɾo~uaj a kapaħ i, to~uʡas sato~u i fataɬ~ɮ karo~umakatan ħo~u no~u ɾaɾan, ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u sato~u a mapataj itija. kataɾaʡajawan ħo~u a nifafaan a kaəmaŋaj wawa i, masakapaħ to~u ko~u to~uʡas naŋra. paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u ʦaŋra a miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ to~u ʦaajaj ħo~u kaɾaħəʦi no~uja mato~uʡasaj, paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u sa taɾaʡajaw ko~u rakat. o~urasaka taħira to~u ʦaŋra to~uja kasaɬ~ɮakan no~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ, misətək to~u ʦaŋra i sakato~usa ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ko~u pipanaʡ to~uja ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ. maraʡo~uɬ~ɮ sato~u ko~u sakato~usa ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ to~u kanikaran to~u ɬ~ɮafak, aɾa mitato~uj ʦaŋra to~u panaʡ, misitara i ɾaʡəɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~uto~uk, mitaɾa to~u kasaɬ~ɮak no~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ, nano~uja i kasaɬ~ɮakan no~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ to~uja i patama ħan naŋra tato~uɾo~u ko~u ʦəʦaj a ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ mipanaʡ, o~uja faʡəɬ~ɮətaj rəməs no~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ pasiɾawaʦ a maʡəfər mitəsiʡ. o~u ʦəʦaj a tamɬ~ɮaw maparaʡo~utəŋ no~uja faʡəɬ~ɮətaj rəməs, nano~uja sa a mapataj, o~uja tato~usaaj mapaʦəɬ~ɮət a maɬ~ɮo~ukaʡ ko~u tatirəŋan. maɾaħəʦi to~u ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak i, pasiɾo~umaʡ to~u ʦaŋra ko~u rakat a mino~ukaj, o~uja kataɾaʡajawan nipaɾo~umaan a mamiʡ i mato~uʡas to~u, maɾo~ufiʦ ko~u kaʦiħəʦi. taħira ʦaŋra i nijaro~uʡ i, o~u maʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ to~u ko~u fo~ukəs a mato~uʡasaj to~u. nano~uja pipanaʡ naŋra to~uja ʦəʦaj a ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ i, maɾo~uwan to~u ko~u təɬ~ɮi ato~u faʡəɬ~ɮət no~uja ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ, ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja i masaɬ~ɮak to~u ko~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ. o~uja matapəsiʡaj rəmas i, maɾafo~uʡis to~u faɾatfat i kakarajan. nano~uja masapinaŋ to~u ko~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ato~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja, saŋaʡaj sato~u ko~u ʡo~urip no~u tamɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw itija.
S.FORM: == O pipana' to cidal a kawakawasan kimad == Iti:ya ho i, tosaay ko cidal i kakarayan, cacorok sa patedi to hekal. Orasaka, awaay ko todong to romi'ad adadya i sekal, mafadi' to ko kilakilang rengorengos, ma'icang to ko nanom no 'alo, caay to ka molengaw ko pinaloma, saka mapades ko tamdaw to saka'orip, malowan to pinaloma cango'ot to kakaenen ko tamdaw. Nanoya masasowasowal to ko tamdamdaw to sapipalasawadaw to cecay a cidal. Itiya ira ko tatoloay macodahay a kapah tayra milood toya cidal. Saka mihawikid cangra to kakaenen, ala mifafa saan cangra to kaemangay a wawa. nanoya lomowad to pasayra cangra toya piloodan a lalan. I karomakatan nangra a tala'ayaw, halo pipaloma han to mamo' ato mifolesak to panay, kalo lalitoden a minokay. Nanoya mata'elif to ko romi'ad, mihecaan ko nirakatan i, caay ka rahoday rakaten nangra koya sacokacok tonotono'an a lalan. Nikawrira, ha:to caay ho katahira toya kasadakan no cidal, wata ko nikaraay rakaten. Oya sato tatoloay a kapah i, to'as sato i fatad karomakatan ho no lalan, dadoedo sato a mapatay itiya. Katala'ayawan ho a nifafaan a kaemangay wawa i, masakapah to ko to'as nangra. Padoedo cangra a midotoc to caayay ho kalaheci noya mato'asay, padoedo sa tala'ayaw ko rakat. Orasaka tahira to cangra toya kasadakan no cidal, misetek to cangra i sakatosa romi'ad ko pipana' toya cidal. Mara'od sato ko sakatosa romi'ad to kanikaran to dafak, ala mitatoy cangra to pana', misitara i la'ed no lotok, mitala to kasadak no cidal, nanoya i kasadakan no cidal toya i patama han nangra tatolo ko cecay a cidal mipana', oya fa'edetay remes no cidal pasilawac a ma'efer mitesi'. O cecay a tamdaw mapara'oteng noya fa'edetay remes, nanoya sa a mapatay, oya tatosaay mapacedet a madoka' ko tatirengan. Malaheci to ko demak i, pasiloma' to cangra ko rakat a minokay, oya katala'ayawan nipalomaan a mami' i mato'as to, malofic ko kaciheci. Tahira cangra i niyaro' i, o ma'ofad to ko fokes a mato'asay to. Nanoya pipana' nangra toya cecay a cidal i, malowan to ko tedi ato fa'edet noya cidal, dadaya i masadak to ko cidal. Oya matapesi'ay remas i, malafo'is to falatfat i kakarayan. Nanoya masapinang to ko romi'ad ato dadaya, sanga'ay sato ko 'orip no tamdamdaw itiya.
S.PHON: == o~u pipanaʡ to~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ a kawakawasan kimaɬ~ɮ == iti:ja ħo~u i, to~usaaj ko~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ i kakarajan, ʦaʦo~uro~uk sa patəɬ~ɮi to~u ħəkaɾ. o~urasaka, awaaj ko~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮja i səkaɾ, mafaɬ~ɮiʡ to~u ko~u kiɾakiɾaŋ rəŋo~urəŋo~us, maʡiʦaŋ to~u ko~u nano~um no~u ʡaɾo~u, ʦaaj to~u ka mo~uɾəŋaw ko~u pinaɾo~uma, saka mapaɬ~ɮəs ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw to~u sakaʡo~urip, maɾo~uwan to~u pinaɾo~uma ʦaŋo~uʡo~ut to~u kakaənən ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. nano~uja masaso~uwaso~uwaɾ to~u ko~u tamɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw to~u sapipaɾasawaɬ~ɮaw to~u ʦəʦaj a ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ. itija ira ko~u tato~uɾo~uaj maʦo~uɬ~ɮaħaj a kapaħ tajra miɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ to~uja ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ. saka miħawikiɬ~ɮ ʦaŋra to~u kakaənən, aɾa mifafa saan ʦaŋra to~u kaəmaŋaj a wawa. nano~uja ɾo~umo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u pasajra ʦaŋra to~uja piɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan a ɾaɾan. i karo~umakatan naŋra a taɾaʡajaw, ħaɾo~u pipaɾo~uma ħan to~u mamo~uʡ ato~u mifo~uɾəsak to~u panaj, kaɾo~u ɾaɾito~uɬ~ɮən a mino~ukaj. nano~uja mataʡəɾif to~u ko~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, miħəʦaan ko~u nirakatan i, ʦaaj ka raħo~uɬ~ɮaj rakatən naŋra ko~uja saʦo~ukaʦo~uk to~uno~uto~uno~uʡan a ɾaɾan. nikawrira, ħa:to~u ʦaaj ħo~u kataħira to~uja kasaɬ~ɮakan no~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ, wata ko~u nikaraaj rakatən. o~uja sato~u tato~uɾo~uaj a kapaħ i, to~uʡas sato~u i fataɬ~ɮ karo~umakatan ħo~u no~u ɾaɾan, ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u sato~u a mapataj itija. kataɾaʡajawan ħo~u a nifafaan a kaəmaŋaj wawa i, masakapaħ to~u ko~u to~uʡas naŋra. paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u ʦaŋra a miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ to~u ʦaajaj ħo~u kaɾaħəʦi no~uja mato~uʡasaj, paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u sa taɾaʡajaw ko~u rakat. o~urasaka taħira to~u ʦaŋra to~uja kasaɬ~ɮakan no~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ, misətək to~u ʦaŋra i sakato~usa ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ko~u pipanaʡ to~uja ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ. maraʡo~uɬ~ɮ sato~u ko~u sakato~usa ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ to~u kanikaran to~u ɬ~ɮafak, aɾa mitato~uj ʦaŋra to~u panaʡ, misitara i ɾaʡəɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~uto~uk, mitaɾa to~u kasaɬ~ɮak no~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ, nano~uja i kasaɬ~ɮakan no~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ to~uja i patama ħan naŋra tato~uɾo~u ko~u ʦəʦaj a ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ mipanaʡ, o~uja faʡəɬ~ɮətaj rəməs no~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ pasiɾawaʦ a maʡəfər mitəsiʡ. o~u ʦəʦaj a tamɬ~ɮaw maparaʡo~utəŋ no~uja faʡəɬ~ɮətaj rəməs, nano~uja sa a mapataj, o~uja tato~usaaj mapaʦəɬ~ɮət a maɬ~ɮo~ukaʡ ko~u tatirəŋan. maɾaħəʦi to~u ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak i, pasiɾo~umaʡ to~u ʦaŋra ko~u rakat a mino~ukaj, o~uja kataɾaʡajawan nipaɾo~umaan a mamiʡ i mato~uʡas to~u, maɾo~ufiʦ ko~u kaʦiħəʦi. taħira ʦaŋra i nijaro~uʡ i, o~u maʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ to~u ko~u fo~ukəs a mato~uʡasaj to~u. nano~uja pipanaʡ naŋra to~uja ʦəʦaj a ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ i, maɾo~uwan to~u ko~u təɬ~ɮi ato~u faʡəɬ~ɮət no~uja ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ, ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja i masaɬ~ɮak to~u ko~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ. o~uja matapəsiʡaj rəmas i, maɾafo~uʡis to~u faɾatfat i kakarajan. nano~uja masapinaŋ to~u ko~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ato~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja, saŋaʡaj sato~u ko~u ʡo~urip no~u tamɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw itija.
